reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 저희 둥이는 눈물왕자인데요~저희집 가족이되고 한달정도 됐을때부터 눈물이 살짝터지기시작해서 바잇미소간파우더 먹이고  눈물세정제는 페땡땡제품을 써왔거든요~바잇미제품은 믿고사기때문에  신제품 나오자마자 바로 구입했어요~오늘 받아서 바로 사용했는데  둥이가 받을때 거부감을 휠씬 덜 느껴하는걸보니 더 순한거같아요~그리고 눈물 특유의 향도 잘 잡아줘요~눈물청소(?)하고 나서 바로 킁킁하고 냄새맡아보는데 냄새가 쌱 잡혔더라구요~화장솜에 적시면 머랄까 치덕치덕하게  푹적셔지는게 아니고 적당하게 촉촉하게 적셔지는것도 완전 맘에들어요~역시 바잇미는 믿고 살수있는 제품만 만들어주시는거같아요~ 바잇미 짱!
reviews.content_en: Our Doongi is a tear prince~ About a month after joining our family, we started noticing some tearing, so we've been giving BITE ME liver powder and using a tear cleanser from another brand. Since I trust BITE ME products, I bought the new product right away~ I received it today and used it immediately, and I noticed Doongi showed much less resistance when using it, so it seems gentler~ And it does a great job of eliminating that distinctive tear smell~ After cleaning the tears (?), Doongi sniffs right away to check the smell, and the odor is completely gone~ When I dampen a cotton pad with it, it doesn't soak it heavily like I'd expect - instead it dampens it just perfectly, which I absolutely love~ BITE ME really does only make products you can trust~ BITE ME is the best!

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 여러 귀, 눈 세정제 브랜드를 사용해 보았는데 항상 사용하면서 인위적인 향과 느낌으로 다쓰기도 전에 버린적이 많았어요! 근데 바잇미 세정제들은 순한 성분들로 이루어져있어서 그런지 인위적인 향과 느낌이 없어서 좋았어요! 착색된 털이 사라질 때까지 사용해보려고합니다😊
reviews.content_en: I've tried several different ear and eye cleansers from various brands, and I always used to throw them away before finishing the bottle because of the artificial scent and feeling. But BITE ME cleansers are made with gentle ingredients, so there's no artificial scent or feeling, which is great! I'm planning to keep using it until the staining in the fur disappears😊

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
우선 무엇보다 성분이 좋아서 마음에 들어요 !

눈이 큰 시츄라 눈관리가 걱정이었는데 
바잇미 덕분에 화장솜으로 눈관리 해주고 있는데 
강아지도 편안한지 가만히 있는데 ㅎㅎ 너무 귀엽고 ㅎㅎ

귀청소는 주입구가 저한텐 조금 불편한 면이 있지만 
익숙해지면 괜찮아질거라 생각합니다 
잘 쓸께요
reviews.content_en: First of all, I love it most because the ingredients are so good! My Shih Tzu has large eyes so I was worried about eye care, but thanks to BITE ME, I've been managing her eyes with a cotton pad, and the puppy just sits still comfortably ㅎㅎ so cute ㅎㅎ The ear cleansing dispenser is a bit inconvenient for me, but I think I'll get used to it with practice. I'll use it well!

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
무향이어서 너무 좋아요!!
피부병을 앓고 있는 아이라 귓병 또한 잠깐 방심하면 생기는 타입이에요ㅠㅠ 그래서 이어클리너는 필수인데 타제품은 향이 너무 세고 성분이 어떤지도 잘 모르겠어서 솔직히 조금 불안했어요. 근데 바잇미는 향도 없는데 성분도 착해서 역시나 믿고 구매했어요. 
아직 사용한지 얼마 안돼서 귓병이 나았는지는 모르겠어요. 하지만 저자극인 점은 확실합니다. 
게다가 무향이라서 그런지 거부감이 없어요!

다만 원터치 캡이어서 귓 속에 직접 넣는 저에게는 불편했어요. 계속 톡톡 쳐야 클리너가 나와서 솜에 적시는 방법이 가장 편리합니다!! 
+원터치 캡이 따로 들어 있기 때문에 불필요한 뚜껑이 있어서 환경보호에 조금,,,그러네요ㅠㅠ 그냥 실링만 해도 액체가 새지는 않을 것 같은데 그 점이 좀 아쉽습니다.
reviews.content_en: I love that it's unscented!! My pup has a skin condition, and if I'm not careful for a moment, ear infections happen too ㅠㅠ So an ear cleaner is essential, but other products have such strong scents and I wasn't sure about the ingredients, so I was honestly a bit anxious. But BITE ME has no scent and good ingredients, so of course I trusted and bought it. I haven't used it for long yet so I'm not sure if the ear infection has cleared, but one thing's for sure - it's definitely low-irritation. Plus, since it's unscented, there's no resistance! However, the one-touch cap was a bit inconvenient for me since I apply it directly in the ear. I have to tap it several times to get the cleaner out, so applying it to a cotton pad is the most convenient method!! Also, since the one-touch cap comes separately, there's an unnecessary cap which is a bit wasteful for the environment ㅠㅠ I feel like the liquid wouldn't leak even with just a seal, which is a shame.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 유통기한 25년으로 길어요! 신규가입회원으로 100원에 구매했는데 너무 만족해요. 눈물이 많은 토이푸들(유전적 샘 막힘)키우느라 매일 2회 눈세정제를 사용하는데 자극 없이 잘 세정되어요. 거부감도 없는 걸 보니 괜찮은 가 봐요(물어봤음) 암턴!!! 평소 사용하던 세정제에서 갈아타겠습니다~!
reviews.content_en: The expiration date is long - 25 years! I bought it for just 100 won as a new member and I'm so satisfied. I have a Toy Poodle with lots of tears (genetic blocked tear duct) and use the eye cleanser twice daily, and it cleanses without irritation. Since she shows no resistance, it must be good (asked her lol) Anyway!!! I'm switching from the cleanser I usually use~!

reviews.name: a****
reviews.content: 좋은 기회에 저렴하게 잘 구매했어요. 눈꼽이 자주 끼는데 기존에 쓰던 아이패드는 성분이 독하다고 하더라구요 화장솜까지 같이 샀는데 성분도 안심되고 싫어하긴 하지만 눈꼽 잘 뗐어요. 귀 세정제도 최근엔 게을러져서 안해줬는데 잊지 말고 세정해줘야겠어요.
reviews.content_en: I got a good deal and bought it cheap. My pup gets eye boogers frequently, and they say the eye pads I used before have harsh ingredients, so I bought it with cotton pads too. The ingredients give me peace of mind and although the pup doesn't like it, it does remove eye boogers well. I also haven't been doing ear cleaning recently, so I should remember to do that too.

reviews.name: 진****
reviews.content: 기존에 사용하던 세정제는 향이 강해서 애들이 그 향만 나면 굉장히 싫어했고 정제수가 주원료라 믿음이 가지 않았어요. 그런데 딱히 대체할 만한 세정제가 없어 그냥 사용하고 있다가 좋은 기회에 바잇미 세정제를 만나게 되었습니다. 우선 가장 좋은 건 아이들을 자극하던 향이 없어 애들의 거부감이 심하지 않았다는 거고 특히, 귀지 제거 후 향이 싫어 그루밍을 한동안 하던 애들이 이 세정제를 사용하고는 그냥 받아들이는 게 좋더라구요. 아직 오래 사용해보지 않았지만 정제수 대신 편백추출물이 주 원료인게 맘에 들었고 향이 나지 않아 드디어 정착할 제품을 찾은 거 같습니다. 마지막으로 화장솜이 3겹으로 되어있어 평소 듬뿍 적셔서 사용하는 사람에게 경제적은 면도 있고 쉽게 찢어지지 않아 애들 귀에 사용하기 좋았습니다. 아기 피부에도 사용하기 좋으니 우리애들에게 사용하기에도 딱이구요.
reviews.content_en: The cleansers I used before had strong scents that made my pups really dislike them, and since purified water was the main ingredient, I didn't have much faith in them. But since there wasn't really an alternative cleanser, I just kept using them until I found BITE ME cleansers by chance. First and foremost, the best thing is that there's no irritating scent that used to bother my pups, so their resistance isn't strong at all. Especially for the pups who used to groom excessively because they disliked the scent after ear cleaning - after using this cleanser, they just accept it, which is great. I haven't used it for very long yet, but I'm happy that the main ingredient is cypress extract instead of purified water, and I think I've finally found a product to stick with since it has no scent. Lastly, the cotton pads are 3-ply, so for people like me who use them generously, it's economical, and they don't tear easily, which is great for using on my pups' ears. It's good for baby skin too, so it's perfect for my pups. I'm already planning to keep buying it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
처음 사용해 보는 아이클리너! 향도 자극적이지 않고 오히려 아로마향 비슷한 편안하게 진정이 되는 향인 것 같아서 닦아주기 전에 저는 코 앞에 한번 쓱 냄새 맡도록 해줘요ㅎㅎ
효과도 상당합니다!!
눈물이 갑자기 많아지고 냄새도 많이 나서 좋은 기회에 구매해 사용하는건데 너무 좋아요!!
호텔링으로 며칠 못 관리해줬다고 눈 주변이 난리였는데ㅜㅜ
바로 닦아주니 바로 좋아지는 클리너입니다ㅎㅎ
꾸준히 구매해서 관리해줘야겠어요~~
reviews.content_en: First time trying an eye cleaner! The scent isn't irritating and it actually seems like a soothing, almost aromatic fragrance, so I let myself take a whiff before cleaning ㅎㅎ The effect is significant!! My pup suddenly started having lots of tears and odor, so I bought it on a good opportunity and I love using it!! The area around the eyes was a mess after not being able to care for it during a hotel stay for a few days ㅜㅜ But cleaning it right away works like magic ㅎㅎ I should keep buying and caring for it consistently~~

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
강아지 눈물 자국 세정제는 이 제품만 쓰고 있어요. 
그런데 은근히 빨리 쓰더라구요. 
그래서 이번엔 2개 시켰어요! 
강아지 눈물이 좀 많이 나서 매일 화장솜에 묻혀서 닦아 주는데 세정력이 좋아요. 추천!!
reviews.content_en: I only use this product for my dog's tear stain cleanser. But I go through it pretty quickly. So this time I ordered 2! Since my pup has a lot of tears, I wipe with a cotton pad daily and the cleansing power is great. Highly recommend!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
배송도 빠르고 세트 구성도 가격도 좋아서 구매했네용!
향기가 깔끔하고 좋아요!! 눈관리 귀관리 믿고 쓰는
바잇미로 해보겠어요
reviews.content_en: Shipping was fast and the set composition and price are good, so I bought it! The scent is clean and nice!! I'm going to trust and use BITE ME for eye and ear care

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 믿고 쓰는 바잇미! VIP로서 드디어 귀세정제&눈물세정제가 나와서 일단 너무 좋아요 ㅠㅠ💜저희 강아지는 어릴때 귓병에 생겨서 병원을 매일 갔던 아니라 귀청소를 정말 싫어해요 그 어떤 순한걸로 해줘도 향이라던가, 말하지 못하는 불편함에 정말 힘들어했는데 신기하게 바잇미 제품으로는 귓바퀴 정도는 닦을 수 있었어요🤭정제수나 일반 물이 아니라 편백수가 들어가서 더 안심하고 무향 무색이고 같이 온 화장솜이 진짜 너무 좋아요 ,,얇아보이는데 흡수력 찰떡이고 자극이 하나도 없어요 ! 제가 쓰고싶을 정도로 ㅋㅋ ㅋㅋㅋ그리고 저희 강아지는 눈물이 많은편이 아니라 눈물자국 같은건 없지만 자극이 있으면 바로 눈가 주변이 붉어지는 아이라서 눈물세정제 유목민 이였는데 다행히 이 제품은 아직 괜찮아요! 더 지켜봐야겠지만 진짜 두개 다 너무 맘에들어요 ㅠㅠㅠ가격도 착하고 저희 강아지는 말을 안해서 모르겠지만 주인(=나)은 너무 좋네요 헤헤헤 앞으로 좋은제품 많이 많이 팔아주세요 ㅠㅠㅠㅠ!!!!!
reviews.content_en: BITE ME you can trust! As a VIP member, I'm so excited that ear cleanser & tear cleanser finally came out ㅠㅠ💜 My pup got an ear infection when young and had to go to the vet daily, so he really hates ear cleaning. Even with gentle products, the scent and other issues made it really difficult, but miraculously with BITE ME products, I was able to wipe at least the outer ear ㅭ Since it contains cypress water instead of purified water or regular water, I feel more at ease, it's unscented and uncolored, and the cotton pads that came with it are really amazing.. they look thin but the absorption is spot-on and there's zero irritation! I want to use them myself lol lol lol And my pup doesn't have a lot of tears so doesn't have tear stains, but she gets redness around her eyes immediately if there's any irritation, so I was a product nomad for eye cleansers. Fortunately this product is okay so far! I need to keep monitoring but I really love both products ㅠㅠㅠ The price is reasonable too and my pup won't tell me but the owner (=me) is really happy hehe Please sell lots of good products going forward ㅠㅠㅠㅠ!!!!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
눈물자국이 너무너무 심한 말티푸 키우고 있어요 🥺
눈물도 많고 눈곱도 많아서 밤마다 강아지 물티슈로 닦고 눈곱빗으로 정리해주는데 물티슈로는 한계가 있어 눈물세정제를 구매해봤숩니다
조금만 묻혀도 눈물 때문에 굳은 털들이 바로 풀어지는게 신기했어요! 그리고 무향이라서 강아지도 안 예민하게 받아들여요 
눈에 솜을 올리고 눈곱을 불리니까 눈곱도 아주 잘 떼집니다 ♡ 
이거 정착템 될 것 같아요 !!
reviews.content_en: My Maltipoo has really severe tear stains 🥺 She has lots of tears and lots of eye boogers so every night I wipe with dog wipes and organize with an eye boger comb, but wipes have their limits so I bought an eye tear cleanser. It's amazing how just a little bit applied immediately dissolves the hardened fur from the tears! And since it's unscented, my pup doesn't react sensitively to it. When I put the pad on her eye and soften the eye boogers, they come off so easily ♡ This seems like it'll be a staple product!!

reviews.name: 민****
reviews.content: 저번에 사서 잘쓰고있던 아이클리너랑 이어클리너 같이 할인해서 엄청 저렴하게 팔길래 미리 구입해뒀어요!!!ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 유통기한도 길어서 안심이에요 눈꼽 불려서 눈가 닦아주기 좋고 향기가 너무 세지 않고 은은한게 정말 맘에들어요👍🏻
reviews.content_en: I was using the eye and ear cleansers I bought before and they had a big discount together so I bought them in advance!!! ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ The expiration date is long so I'm relieved. It's great for softening eye boogers and wiping the eyes, the scent isn't too strong and is subtle, which I really love👍🏻

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 너무너무 좋아요 ㅠㅠ 성분 좋은 제품 찾고 있었는데 성분도 좋고 향도 자극적이지 않고 최고입니다😀👍
reviews.content_en: I absolutely love it ㅠㅠ I was looking for a product with good ingredients and this has great ingredients, a non-irritating scent, and it's the best😀👍

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 눈물자국은 없지만 눈꼽은 잘껴서 매일 닦아줘야하는데 다른제품은 닦아주면 빳빳해지더라구요 .. 물, 정제수 대신 편백수를 사용해서그런지 향부터 건강한 느낌이에요ㅋㅋㅋ 매일 사용해도 괜찮을것같고 그리고 무엇보다 소프트코튼 최고에요!!! 매번 사람용 화장솜 쓰기 걱정됐는데 소프트코튼까지 있어서 안심하고 편하게 사용했어요
reviews.content_en: I don't have tear stains but get lots of eye boogers so I have to wipe daily. Other products made things feel stiff and dry when I wiped.. I think using cypress water instead of water or purified water gives it a healthy feel to the scent ㅋㅋㅋ It should be fine to use daily and most importantly the soft cotton is amazing!!! I was always worried about using human-use cotton pads but I feel relieved and comfortable using it now that soft cotton is included

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
안녕하세요 올해 8살 된 러시안블루 스티브 박입니다. 
지난 여름부터였을까요... 나고 자란 이후 잘 관리되던 제 귀속에 귀지가 제법 생기더군요. 
"....여름이었다" 하고 넘기기엔 이틀에 한번 꼴로 귀를 닦아야만 하는 곤란한 상황에 이르르고야 말았답니다.
그래서 세계 최고 반려동물 관련 기업 바잇미코리아의 소프트 이어클리너를 빠르게 주문 및 배송 받았습니다.

아뿔싸! 예상보다 일찍 가을이 찾아왔고 제 귀는 다시 뽀송해졌습니다.
예예... 그래서 아직 못 써봤습니다. 
그럼에도 바잇미 특유의 키치한 디자인과 꼼꼼한 포장, 제품 마감은 마음에 드는군요 감사합니다.
reviews.content_en: Hello, I'm Steve Park, an 8-year-old Russian Blue born this year. Was it last summer...? After birth and growing up, my ears were well maintained, but ear wax started accumulating quite a bit. "....It was summer" - I couldn't just leave it at that since I had to clean my ears every other day, reaching quite a troublesome situation. So I quickly ordered and received the BITE ME Korea soft ear cleaner, the world's greatest pet company's product. Oh no! Fall came earlier than expected and my ears became fluffy again. Yep... So I haven't tried it yet. Still, I do like BITE ME's signature quirky design, careful packaging, and product finishing. Thank you.

reviews.name: 최****

reviews.content_en:
I originally used the pads, and this time I decided to try the cleanser 💕
I bought it because it's supposed to be gentle ⭐️
As someone who's only raised 2 Pomeranians so far,
I was worried about tear stains, but I was someone who had nothing to do with eye boogers in my whole life of dog ownership.
But with a Maltese, instead of shedding fur,
I'd say the tears and eye boogers come out just as much.
You wipe them away and turn around and they're dirty again 🥹
Fortunately, my Maltese doesn't bite or resist—she's such a good girl who listens to everything mom says,
so I wipe her every time she gets messy. About 2-3 times a day? That's why
gentle formula is so important.
The pads were way too wet—once you wipe, it's like giving her a shower,
but with this cleanser you can control the amount,
so I dampen a cotton pad with the amount I want and wipe,
which is great 👍
It saves time so it's easier for her too, and after I finish with a light powder and brush her fur, she looks shiny and fluffy. I think it's less stressful and I'll keep using it consistently 🤍

reviews.content_en:
Our Peanut
These days with all the wind, dry weather, and heavy fine dust,
her eyes tear up and she gets lots of eye boogers 😢

I wipe her with face cleanser or tear cleanser every day,
but the vet said it's more important to wipe well and dry thoroughly
to prevent irritation from the tears.

I bought several products and even tested them on my own eyes,
and products with strong scents actually made my eyes sting,
but 🧡BITE ME Soft Tear Cleanser🧡
was completely non-irritating.

I applied the cleanser to ⭐️BITE ME Soft Cotton Pads⭐️
and laid them on her eyes, waited about 30 seconds, then gently wiped,
and dried eye boogers fell right off and even redness came out on the pad.

But most importantly, the baby doesn't seem irritated at all—
she just sat still quietly even while the pad was on her eyes, which surprised me!

I also used a famous ear cleanser from another site,
but I felt the scent was overpowering.

💛BITE ME Soft Ear Cleanser💛
Before wiping,
I could smell that stale ear odor coming from her ears,
but after wiping, I noticed a subtle hinoki cypress scent 🌿 coming through.

When I massage her ears, she closes her eyes smoothly
as if she's actually enjoying it, so my family and I couldn't stop laughing!

And one more thing that touched me—
both products have integrated caps, so you don't pull off the cap,
you just twist it open to dispense and twist it closed.
It felt like they really thought carefully about the product details, and I was genuinely moved.

But most importantly, the ⭐️BITE ME Soft Cotton Pads⭐️
that work so perfectly with both products—

I've been using them as my go-to cotton pads whenever I clean her eyes and ears,
and I've also tried cotton pads that come with other brands' pet face cleansers,
but those were a bit thicker than BITE ME's, and actually gave off a dusty feeling.

But the 100% pure cotton BITE ME Soft Cotton pads
have received certification labels for textile products,
so I've heard you can trust and use them without worry.

Among those, they received the highest Grade 1 certification,
so I feel confident and safe using them for my babies.

Thank you so much BITE ME for making good products with good ingredients ❤️

reviews.content_en:
-Eye Cleanser
Since my pup has so many tears, you know that smell, right? That stuffy, pungent odor..
After using the cleanser regularly, the smell is gone!
Also, since I'm wiping so often, I was worried their eye area skin might get damaged,
but thanks to the cica care providing moisture and skin regeneration, I can use it without worry. Now let's say bye-bye to that tear smell, my stinky pup 🤍

-Ear Cleanser
My pup has droopy ears, so I was wondering why there's such a smell—if I don't manage it, the odor builds up.. They're usually calm during eye care, but they make a fuss during ear care. But this one has no smell and isn't irritating, so it's great!

-Soft Cotton Pads
Since they're 100% pure cotton, they're soft just to touch. Before using on my pup, I actually tested it on my own skin with toner and wow... it applies smoothly without any irritation. I wanted to use these for myself, but I'll give these good products to my pup instead.

Overall, the ingredients are gentle, it's effective, most importantly my pup doesn't have any strong rejection, and the value for money is great—this is what I call a BITE ME moment!
Compared to the product I was using before, I love everything about the price and ingredients,
so I think I'll be sticking with BITE ME cleanser from now on.
Thank you for the great product ❤️

Since the package comes with 100% pure cotton pads, there's no need to buy them separately, and they clearly look different from cheap generic cotton pads—they shed less lint and are great!

and the cap itself dispenses the product in small amounts rather than pouring out all at once, making it practical for direct application.

For friends whose ears aren't in good condition and are worried about which cleanser to use! For friends sensitive to scents! For friends with excessive tearing who keep getting eye discharge even after changing food—I recommend this!

reviews.name: 은****
reviews.content:
😀은복이네 바잇미후기
은복이가 요즘 귀를 자주 긁더라구요 그런데 딱 마침 바잇미에서 귀세정제와 눈물세정제가 세트로 나와서 사용해보게 되었어요!
다른 귀세정제는 향이 강하거나 자주 세정을 해줘도 긁는 건 변함이 없더라구요
세정을 한 당일날만 귀에서 냄새가 안났는데 바잇미 세정제는 달랐습니다!
은복이가 사용해보니 긁는 횟수가 현저하게 적어젔어요!
그리고 아이가 거부감없이 귀 청소할때 발라당 눕더라구요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ

그리고 은복이가 털이 흰색인 비숑이다보니
눈물이 나면 정말 티가 나는 강아지인데요 
조류 알레르기가 있어서 조류를 먹으면 눈물이 나거나 워낙 평소에도 눈물이 조금씩 보이더라구오
이때 바잇미 눈물세정제로 닦아주니까 자극없이 관리가 가능했어요
특히 편백수로 되어있어서 안심이 되었습니다!

또 제가 정말 좋았던 건 솜입니다!
솜이 아주 부드러워서 아이에게 자극이 가지않아 완전 추천입니다!
눈물이나 귀세정제 구매를 망설이신다면 한번 써보세요!
은복이네가 완전 강추 합니다~
reviews.content_en:
😀 Eunbok's BITE ME Review
Eunbok has been scratching her ears a lot lately, and right at that moment, BITE ME came out with an ear cleanser and eye tear cleanser set, so I decided to try them!
With other ear cleansers, either the scent is strong or even with frequent cleanings, the scratching doesn't improve. The smell would only go away on the day of cleaning, but BITE ME's cleanser was different!
After using it on Eunbok, her scratching has decreased significantly!
And when I clean her ears, she just flops down without any resistance ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ

Since Eunbok is a white Bichon, tear stains show up really clearly on her. She has a poultry allergy, so she tears up when she eats poultry, and she tends to have a bit of tearing even normally. When I clean with BITE ME's eye tear cleanser, I can manage it without irritation. I especially feel reassured that it's made with Cypress water!

What I really loved most was the cotton pads!
The pads are so soft that there's no irritation for my pet - I totally recommend them!
If you're hesitant about getting eye tear or ear cleansers, just try them once!
Eunbok's family highly recommends them~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
[소프트 아이 클리너 저자극 눈물 세정제 & 소프트 이어 클리너 저자극 귀 세정제 세트 후기]

저희 애기는 눈물자국은 없지만 눈꼽이 자주 끼는 편이라 바로바로 떼주지 않으면 털이랑 굳어서 잘 떼지지 않아요
그런데 소프트 코튼에 [눈물세정제] 듬뿍 묻혀 얻어주고 떼주면 부드럽게 제거가 되고 가볍에 슥슥 닦아 주니 편리하네요 ! 
눈꼽 떼줄 때 슥슥, 이물질 묻었을 때 슥슥, 짱편리
그리고 진정에 도움되고 저자극이라 부담 없이 쓸 수 있어 좋아요 !
[귀세정제]는 타브랜드 썼을때는 하루정도는 향기냄새가 나서 역했는데 이건 무향이라 너무너무 좋고 성분도 착해서 안심하고 쓸 수 있어요 👍🏻
[소프트코튼]는 사용해 본 화장솜 중에는 면적도 넓어서 하나만으로도 충분하고 얇아서 흡수가 잘되요 !
계속 사용해보고 좋으면 정착 하려구요 
바잇미 애정합니다 💛☺️💛
reviews.content_en:
[Soft Eye Cleanser Low-Irritant Eye Tear Cleanser & Soft Ear Cleanser Low-Irritant Ear Cleanser Set Review]

My baby doesn't have tear stains, but gets eye boogers frequently, so if I don't remove them right away, they harden with the fur and become hard to remove. When I soak the Soft Cotton generously with the [Eye Tear Cleanser] and gently wipe, it removes smoothly, and a quick wipe is super convenient! Quick wipe for eye boogers, quick wipe for any foreign matter - so easy and convenient! Plus, it helps soothe and is low-irritant so I can use it without worry!

[Ear Cleanser] When I used other brands, there was a lingering scent for about a day which was unpleasant, but this one is fragrance-free which is amazing, and the ingredients are so good that I can use it with confidence 👍🏻

[Soft Cotton] Among all the cotton pads I've tried, the size is so wide that one is enough, and it's thin so it absorbs really well!
I'm going to keep using them and make them my go-to if they keep working well. I love BITE ME 💛☺️💛

reviews.name: 수****
reviews.content:
써보고 후기 남겨요.
말티푸라도 모질이나 체형 체질이 푸들에 가까운 아이이고 털이 흰색이라 눈물 자국이나 더러움에 착색이 잘되어 미용적으로도 신경을 쓰고, 노화로 인한 백내장 핵경화증이 있는 아이라 눈 청결에도 신경쓰고 있어요. 
-
매일매일 쓰는건 아니고 성분을 보고 일단 써보니 자극이 있을 것 같진않아요. 화장솜에 묻혀서 닦아주는데 일단 무색 무향이라 좋네요. 통이 투명으로 내용물 확인이 되면 좋을 것같아요. 아쉬운 부분. 
근데 투명 뚜껑 위쪽에 구멍이 나있던데 이 캡을 빼지않고 바로 사용하는 걸까요? 솜에 묻혀 사용하는지라 뚜껑 빼고 썼는데. 제가 놓친건지 상세설명 한번더 봐야겠어요.
-
이번에 작정하고 의도한건 아닌데 다 바잇미 자체제작 상품들로만 구입했네요. 앞으로도 야무진 상품 부탁드립니다.
reviews.content_en:
I'll share my thoughts after using it.
My Maltipoo has fur texture and body type/constitution closer to a poodle, and since her fur is white, tear stains and dirt show easily, so I pay attention to grooming. She also has cataracts and nuclear sclerosis from aging, so I'm careful about keeping her eyes clean.
-
I don't use it every day, but after checking the ingredients and trying it, it doesn't seem to cause irritation. I apply it with a cotton pad to wipe, and it's nice that it's colorless and odorless. One downside would be that the container is opaque—it would be nice if I could see the contents. I noticed there's a hole at the top of the transparent cap—am I supposed to use it without removing the cap? Since I apply it with cotton, I took the cap off to use it. I should check the detailed instructions again to see if I missed something.
-
This time I didn't plan it, but I ended up purchasing only BITE ME's own products. Looking forward to more quality products in the future!

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
저희애는 오리 알러지 닭 알러지
쫌만 잘못먹어도 폭풍 눈물이 터지고
귀도 같이 안좋아져요
그래서 먹는것도 좋은것만 먹이려고 노력하고
눈 귀 케어를 열심히 해주는 편이에요
눈 귀가 워낙 예민해서 세정액도 좀만 강한거 쓰면 
눈이나 귀가 빨개져서 안맞으면 못쓰고 하는데
이번에 바잇미 체험단이 되어서 
요 며칠 사용해봤는데 
성분이 좋아서 그런지 자극도 없고
눈꼽 마른거까지 다 닦일 정도로 세정력도 좋고
화장솜도 톡톡하니 찢어지지도 않고 맘에들어요!
이번에는 좋은 기회로 미리 써볼수 있었지만
체험단이 아니어도 앞으로도 계속 구매하게 될 것 같습니다.
역시 믿고 쓰는 바잇미 입니다❤️❤️👍
reviews.content_en:
My pup has duck and chicken allergies.
If she eats even slightly wrong food, her eyes tear up like crazy
and her ears get bad too.
So I try to feed her only good quality food
and I'm diligent about eye and ear care.
Since her eyes and ears are so sensitive, even slightly strong cleansers
can cause her eyes or ears to get red, and if it doesn't work, I have to stop using it.
This time I became a BITE ME tester,
and after using it for a few days,
the ingredients are so good there's no irritation,
and the cleansing power is so effective it even removes dried eye discharge.
I also love that the cotton pads are sturdy and don't tear!
This time I got to try it early through this great opportunity,
but even without being a tester,
I feel like I'll keep buying this going forward.
BITE ME is truly trustworthy! ❤️❤️👍

reviews.content: 눈주변에 사용하는거라 성분을 보고 사는 편인데 기존 쓰던 제품보다 가격도 좀 저렴한 편인데 성분이 괜찮아 보여 다른 제품 구매하면서 사봤어요
reviews.content_en: Since it's used around the eyes, I check the ingredients before buying. It's a bit cheaper than the product I was using before, and the ingredients look decent, so I tried it when purchasing other products.
